calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Confirming Title To Personal Property
Off Calendar Sep-06-2016 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court stated that this is a petition confirming title to personal property, that it has been continued several times to respond to examiner's notes, that there is no one present today, that there is no reason to maintain this on the Court's calendar and too the Petition for Order Confirming Title to Personal Property off calendar.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Fender. (Not Reported)
